name: 20 — Directory SEO Engine (Scrape → Build → Submit → Index)

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "max_tokens": 4000, "system": "You are a programmatic SEO expert. Extract structured data and output ONLY valid JSON.", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Extract structured listing data from this crawled content for a '" + $('Manual Trigger').item.json.niche + "' directory.

Content:
" + JSON.stringify($json.data?.slice(0,50)) + "

Return JSON: { "listings": [{"name": string, "slug": string, "description": string, "category": string, "subcategory": string, "tags": string[], "website": string, "location": string, "rating": number|null, "highlights": string[]}], "categories": string[], "total_count": number }" }] } }}

={{ { "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "max_tokens": 4000, "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Design a programmatic SEO directory for the '" + $('Manual Trigger').item.json.niche + "' niche.
Brand sponsor: " + $('Manual Trigger').item.json.brand_name + " (" + $('Manual Trigger').item.json.brand_url + ")
Data: " + $json.content[0].text.substring(0, 1000) + "

Return a CLAUDE.md-style plan with:
1. URL structure
2. Page types and templates
3. Postgres schema (SQL)
4. SEO strategy (meta titles, schema.org types)
5. Brand integration points
6. Long-tail keyword patterns
7. Estimated pages to generate

Be specific and actionable." }] } }}

={{ { "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "max_tokens": 500, "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Write submission copy for directory '" + $json.site_name + "' in niche '" + $json.niche + "'.\nReturn JSON: {\"tagline\": string (10 words max), \"description\": string (50 words), \"category\": string, \"keywords\": string[]}" }] } }}

nodes.name: Drip Delay (1 batch/day)
nodes.notes: Drip: submit 100 URLs per day to avoid spam signals

nodes.name: IndexNow → Bing + ChatGPT
nodes.notes: Single submission → hits Bing, ChatGPT, Yandex, Naver simultaneously
